1.0.5.title: Welcome to GitNova v1.0.5!
notes: 🟣 Claude (Anthropic) provider — claude-opus-4-5, claude-sonnet-4-5, and more
🌿 /rename-branch — rename current branch locally and remotely in one step
📊 /stats — view total commits, lines added/removed, and authors
🗂️ /config — view your saved config and API keys (redacted) from the menu
💻 --version / -v flag — instantly print GitNova, Git, GitHub CLI and Node versions
🌍 Linux & macOS support — shell commands now auto-adapt to your OS

1.0.4.title: Welcome to GitNova v1.0.4!
notes: 🚀 Auto Mode: gitnova --auto now stages, AI-commits, and pushes in one command
🛡️ Security Guard: AI scans staging and push payloads for secrets and bloat
🩹 Auto-Healing: Git errors are explained by AI and fixes are proposed automatically
🤖 Multi-provider: Added Groq (fast inference) as a third AI provider
🔗 Seamless GitHub setup: Missing remotes are auto-detected and fixed on startup
